https://pulseframelabs.com/bot.title: Pulseframelabs
buttons:
Chat Relay
Relay all Twitch chat messages to overlays

Hotwords
Count word frequency from chat messages

Slot Requests
Handle !sr <game> commands from viewers

Quick Guesses
Handle guess commands from viewers

Points Battle
Handle !bet commands for predictions

Loyalty Giveaways
Track keyword entries for giveaways
